stemHtml: During a flight, the Senior Cabin Crew Member informs the flight crew that a passenger is using a Portable Electronic Device (PED) (a satellite phone) which could adversely affect the aircraft electronic systems. Which option is correct?

options.a: In accordance with the type rating training, the Commander can determine whether to allow continued use of the device or not.
options.b: In accordance with the operator's procedures, the Commander may require the PED to be switched off or in flight mode.
options.c: The Commander must request permission from Operations Control to deny the passenger his/her right to use the PED.
options.d: The Commander can issue a temporary permit to allow use of the PED.
